imap_next_required.priority: MANDATORY — covers entire 50-day IMAP gap. Per lead, in send order. If INTERESTED reply found before a lead's Day-14: cancel Day-14 for that lead, use proposal flow instead.

if_interested.action: Write reply to new_replies.json immediately. Classify here as INTERESTED with full reasoning. Cancel Day-14 send for this lead (use proposal flow instead — do NOT send breakup to an interested lead). Prepare bespoke proposal within 24h from reply time (24/7 — NON-NEGOTIABLE). Update value_delivery_queue.json batch_5_interested_leads. Log CHANGELOG.
if_interested.24h_sla: NON-NEGOTIABLE. Tom (Ripon Road Carpentry) asked for pricing and never received it. That does not repeat. 24h applies 24/7 including Saturday and Sunday.
if_interested.proposal_options: See value_delivery_queue.json (value_delivery_on_interested section) — 3 options by signal type.

if_not_interested.action: Classify as NOT_INTERESTED. Cancel Day-14 permanently. Suppress email channel permanently. Log CHANGELOG. Update lead status to 'lost'.

if_ooo.action: Classify as OUT_OF_OFFICE. Note return date. Return MUST be before 2026-05-25 to receive Day-14. If return date is 2026-05-26 or later: mark sequence complete — cannot send Day-14 (4-touchpoint hard limit). Do NOT extend sequence past Day-14 for OOO.
if_ooo.ooo_cutoff: 2026-05-25 — last return date that allows Day-14 to be received on 2026-05-26

if_wrong_person.action: Classify as WRONG_PERSON. Pause sequence. Investigate correct contact via website or Companies House. Log CHANGELOG.

if_unsubscribe.action: Classify as UNSUBSCRIBE. Cancel Day-14. Suppress ALL channels permanently within 24h (GDPR Article 21). Log audit_log and CHANGELOG.
